final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical screenshot of a Douyin livestream featuring "神仙姐姐" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "Douyin livestream" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2020s Chinese short-video platform UI, Kuaishou livestream interface heritage, TikTok live UI conventions; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical framing typical of mobile livestream screenshots
Subject: must include "神仙姐姐" as the livestreamer holding a sign
Scene/backdrop: must be a livestream room setting with typical Douyin UI elements (viewer count, comments, gift buttons, etc.)
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, engaging livestream atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant, attention-grabbing direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve "神仙姐姐" as the streamer's identity; must include typical Douyin livestream UI elements (viewer count, comment feed, interaction buttons)
Avoid: must avoid any real celebrity likeness infringement; must avoid any existing brand logos or copyrighted interface elements
